name: ProgramTab: Boosting Table Reasoning of LLMs via Programmatic Paradigm
summary: arXiv:2607.11207v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Table-based reasoning with large language models (LLMs), which requires reasoning based on natural language questions and structured tabular data,...
description: arXiv:2607.11207v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Table-based reasoning with large language models (LLMs), which requires reasoning based on natural language questions and structured tabular data, has gained widespread attention. However, a series of issues still constrain the application of this task. The previous approaches suffered from significant performance degradation when faced with lar...
author: Pei Guo, Enjie Liu, Yunzhi Tan, Mochi Gao, Jianxin Zhang, Ruichao Zhong, Juntao Li, Bo Hu, Zang Li
